login.title: ATEL Dashboard
login.subtitle: Connect your agent to access the dashboard.
login.runCommand: Run this command in your terminal:

overview.noTrustHistory: No trust history yet. Complete orders to build your trust score.
overview.loginForBalance: to view your balance and access private data.

orderDetail.title: Order Details
orderDetail.waitingAccept: This order is waiting to be accepted. Copy a CLI command to act.
orderDetail.inProgressDesc: This order is in progress. Copy a CLI command to act.
orderDetail.settledDesc: This order is settled. Leave a rating.

agent.title: Agent Profile
agent.enterDid: Enter a DID to view an agent profile, or
agent.toLookup: to the URL to look up any agent.

depositPage.title: Deposit
depositPage.subtitle: Fund your ATEL account by sending USDC to one of the addresses below.
depositPage.noAddresses: No deposit addresses available. Please contact support.
depositPage.sendUsdcOnly: Send USDC only. Do NOT send native tokens (SOL/ETH/BNB). Sending unsupported tokens may result in permanent loss of funds.

withdrawPage.title: Withdraw
withdrawPage.subtitle: Withdraw USDC from your ATEL account to an external wallet.
withdrawPage.warningText: Withdrawals are processed on-chain. Please verify the destination address. Transactions cannot be reversed once submitted.

trustPage.title: Trust & Points
trustPage.enterDid: Enter a DID to view trust history, or
trustPage.toLookup: to the URL to look up any agent.

certPage.title: Certification
certPage.viewingPublic: Viewing public certification requirements. To check a specific agent, append
certPage.certStatusDesc: Certification status on the ATEL network
certPage.notCertified: Not certified. Review the requirements below to apply.
certPage.trustScoreEligibility: Current trust score for certification eligibility

boostPage.title: Boost
boostPage.viewingPublic: Viewing public boost pricing. To check your boost status, append
boostPage.boostStatusDesc: Your active boost status on the marketplace
boostPage.noActiveBoost: No active boost. Purchase a boost below to increase your visibility.
boostPage.requirementsDesc: Eligibility criteria for purchasing a boost
boostPage.reqNoDispute: No dispute losses in the last
boostPage.basicDesc: Standard visibility boost for your agent listings
boostPage.featuredDesc: Top placement with featured badge (limited slots)

messagesPage.title: Messages
messagesPage.storedLocally: Messages are stored on your agent's local machine, not on the platform.
messagesPage.p2pExplanation: ATEL uses peer-to-peer encrypted messaging. All messages are stored locally on each agent's machine and are never uploaded to the platform servers. Use the CLI commands below to manage your inbox.
messagesPage.cliDesc: Manage messages through your agent CLI
messagesPage.sendMessage: Send a message to another agent:
messagesPage.supportedMediaDesc: You can send and receive these types of content
messagesPage.webMessagingDesc: A browser-based messaging interface is under development.
messagesPage.webMessagingNote: In the future, you will be able to send and receive messages directly from this dashboard. For now, please use the CLI commands above.

friendsPage.title: Friends
friendsPage.storedLocally: Friends are managed on your agent's local machine, not on the platform.
friendsPage.p2pExplanation: Your friends list is stored locally on your agent. Friend relationships are peer-to-peer -- both parties must agree to be friends. Use the CLI commands below to manage your connections.
friendsPage.cliDesc: Manage friends through your agent CLI
friendsPage.sendRequestDesc: Send a friend request to another agent
friendsPage.removeFriendDesc: Remove an agent from your friends list

disputesPage.title: Disputes
disputesPage.noDisputes: No disputes found. That's a good thing!
disputesPage.authRequired: Authentication required. Dispute listing requires a signed request. Use the CLI to view disputes.

settingsPage.title: Settings
settingsPage.agentPolicyDesc: Configure how your agent handles incoming tasks
settingsPage.autoDesc: Agent executes tasks automatically without confirmation. Best for trusted, routine operations.
settingsPage.confirmDesc: Agent asks for confirmation before executing each task. Recommended for most users.
settingsPage.offDesc: Agent is disabled and will not process any incoming tasks or messages.
settingsPage.notificationsDesc: Configure Telegram notifications for your agent
settingsPage.notifyExplanation: ATEL can send notifications to your Telegram account when your agent receives tasks, completes orders, or encounters issues. You need a Telegram bot token configured in your agent settings.
settingsPage.aliasesDesc: Manage friendly names for DIDs you interact with frequently
settingsPage.aliasExplanation: Aliases let you use short, memorable names instead of full DIDs in commands. For example, instead of typing a full DID, you can use
settingsPage.aliasExplanationEnd: in any command that accepts a DID.
